description_long: This is a small, toy-like airplane constructed from interlocking plastic bricks, featuring a predominantly white and black color scheme with some red and green accents. The airplane has a single open cockpit with a seated astronaut figure, a control yoke, and a printed panel with space-themed graphics. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with cylindrical engine-like elements attached beneath each wing. The tail section includes a horizontal stabilizer with two red lights and a single vertical stabilizer. The nose of the airplane is equipped with a green-tipped element resembling a laser or sensor. The overall design is compact and stylized, evoking a retro-futuristic space vehicle rather than a conventional urban aircraft.
description: A compact, stylized toy airplane built from white and black plastic bricks, featuring an open cockpit with an astronaut figure and space-themed details. The design includes low-mounted straight wings, a single vertical tail, and colorful accent elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open cockpit with astronaut, control yoke, and green-tipped nose element, with wings and engines visible on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the astronaut's profile, the control yoke, and the straight wing with cylindrical engine detail beneath it.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail section with two red lights, the single vertical stabilizer, and the back of the cockpit with control panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the astronaut, control yoke, and wing with engine detail, as well as the green-tipped nose element.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single cylindrical engine-like elements under each wing, resembling jet or rocket pods.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer featuring two red lights.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; appears to rest directly on its underside.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a control yoke and printed instrument panel.
